# Copilot Instructions - Lesson 10 Pomodoro

## House Rules

1. **Vanilla only** No frameworks, no build step, no npm packages. Browser APIs only.
2. **Three files** 'index.html', 'style.css', and 'app.js' . Do not vreate others without asking first.
3. **Comments only when the "why" is non-obvious.** Do not narrate what the code does - the names should already say it.
